text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, January 19. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan's team played a match and won 1-0! It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Sounds exciting! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. It was a really interesting history episode. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the telemetry feeds. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
